---
name: Bug report
about: Something in LoopPrint is broken — the wizard, a script, or a generated artifact
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**Which part**
- [ ] The wizard / skill (`SKILL.md`)
- [ ] A script (`loopprint-lint` / `detect` / `doctor` / `report` / `skillify` / `ls`)
- [ ] A generated artifact (`run-this-loop.sh` / `verify.sh` / `maker.sh` / `loop-spec.yaml`)
- [ ] Install / discovery in a harness

**Harness & platform**
- Harness (Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode / Pi / Hermes / OpenClaw / generic):
- OS (Linux / macOS / Windows+WSL / Windows native):
- Python (`python3 --version`):

**Doctor output**
Paste `python3 scripts/loopprint-doctor.py` — it usually pinpoints install issues.
